name: Crock Pot b b Q
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup hickory smoke flavored BBQ sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the meat and sliced onion in the crock pot.
2. Fill the crock pot with 3 cups of water.
3. Pour in 1/2 cup of hickory smoke-flavored BBQ sauce and 3/4 cup of regular BBQ sauce.
4. Cook on high for 4 to 6 hours or cook on low overnight.
5. Once done, drain any remaining water from the crock pot.
6. Remove the onion pieces.
7. Add the remaining BBQ sauces and cook on low for an additional hour.
